title: RunPlan
description: Immutable broker-compiled run plan binding deterministic gate, executor, and logical scope data.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for immutable run plans.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this run plan.

plan_id.description: Stable compiled plan identity; separate from logical scope IDs and attempt IDs.

supersedes_plan_id.description: Optional prior plan identity superseded by this immutable plan.

run_id.description: Run identity bound to this plan.

project_context_identity_digest.description: Optional validated project-substrate snapshot identity bound to this compiled run plan for fail-closed continuation and drift detection.

workflow_id.description: Reviewed workflow identity compiled into this plan as the selection and policy-binding surface.

workflow_version.description: Reviewed workflow-facing packaging version bound at compile time, independent from executable process graph versioning.

process_id.description: Authoritative process identity compiled into this plan for executable graph authority.

approval_profile.description: Shared formal approval-frequency input bound by trusted compilation; distinct from autonomy posture.

autonomy_posture.description: Shared operator-guidance/continuation posture input bound by trusted compilation; distinct from approval profile.

policy_binding_id.description: Optional reviewed policy binding identity carried from workflow binding metadata.

workflow_definition_hash.description: Canonical hash of the reviewed workflow selection/policy-binding payload used for planning.

process_definition_hash.description: Canonical hash of the authoritative process executable-graph payload used for planning.

policy_context_hash.description: Canonical hash of the trusted compiled policy context bound at planning time.

compiled_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the broker compiled this immutable plan.

role_instance_ids.description: Deterministic logical role scopes referenced by planned gate entries.

executor_bindings.description: Authoritative process executor bindings frozen into this plan.

binding_id.description: Stable binding identity referenced by planned gate entries.

executor_id.description: Trusted executor registry identity bound for dispatch and policy validation.

executor_class.description: Execution risk class expected by policy for this binding.

allowed_role_kinds.description: Role kinds allowed to dispatch this executor binding.

items.description: One allowed role kind for this binding.

description.description: Optional human-facing summary for operator diagnostics.

gate_definitions.description: Deterministic authoritative process gates frozen for runtime execution authority.

dependency_edges.description: Typed executable dependency edges carried from the authoritative process DAG.

upstream_step_id.description: Step identity that must complete before downstream execution is eligible.

downstream_step_id.description: Step identity blocked by upstream completion requirements.

dependency_kind.description: Typed dependency semantics for v0 DAG planning.

entries.description: Compiled runtime execution entries consumed directly by the runner without reconstructing from gate definitions.

entry_kind.description: Runtime entry discriminator for v0 DAG execution.

stage_id.description: Stable logical stage identity for this runtime entry.

step_id.description: Stable logical step identity for this runtime entry.

role_instance_id.description: Logical role scope identity where this entry executes.

executor_binding_id.description: Reviewed executor binding selected for this runtime entry.

checkpoint_code.description: Explicit checkpoint placement declared by planner.

gate.description: Gate contract authority for this runtime entry.

dependency_cache_handoffs.description: Optional broker-mediated dependency cache handoff requirements that must be satisfied before this entry executes.

consumer_role.description: Workspace role kind authorized for this dependency handoff.

required.description: Dependency handoff requirements are fail-closed when present in a plan entry.

depends_on_entry_ids.description: Compiled upstream runtime entry identities that must complete before this entry is eligible.

blocks_entry_ids.description: Compiled downstream runtime entry identities blocked on this entry completion.

supported_wait_kinds.description: Shared broker-owned execution wait vocabulary supported by this compiled runtime entry.
